title: aster breweri
intro: Aster breweri, also known as Brewere's Aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aster breweri include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Aster breweri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
